PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adamont Georgeson appeared by zoom for Taleb Jalal (petitioner).
Scott Judson appeared by zoom for William Brotherton (objector).

Discussion was held regarding Mr. Judson's intent to have a professional fiduciary appointed, the difficulty in finding a professional to take this on with the looming spousal property petition due to the fees being de minimis if the property flows through spousal property, Mr. Georgeson being willing to move forward with administration of the estate, but his client not being willing to drop the spousal property petition, the result of Mr. Georgeson's client's interest in the property being significantly different under intestate succession, Mr. Georgeson being reluctant to drop his petition until he knows what the assets are, the issue of whether Mr. Georgeson's client will be able to prove her marriage to the decedent, the issue of subpoenaing records to determine what the assets are, the parties coming to an agreement with regard to splitting the fees for the appointment of a professional as well as how they would be paid, and then filing another petition, etc. Mr. Judson stated that he will drop his objections as long as Mr. Georgeson's client is bonded. The Petition for Spousal Property is denied without prejudice. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to December 2, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Dec-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adamont Georgeson appeared by zoom for Taleb Jalal (petitioner).
Scott Judson appeared by zoom for William Brotherton (objector).

Mr. Georgeson stated that he would like to postpone the matter, that he has had conversation with Mr. Judson, and that he may be substituting out of the case and withdrawing his petition, but he wants to make sure his client is protected. Mr. Georgeson also stated that he just found out that his client is not a direct beneficiary of one of the major accounts. Mr. Judson stated that he does not see why there can't be a dismissal of the spousal property petition. The Petition for Spousal Property, and the Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to August 28, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the spousal property petition is to be withdrawn, it will be done at that time. If Mr. Judson files a petition for probate, it is to be given a hearing date of August 28, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Adamont Georgeson, Esq., for Taieb Jalal, Petitioner.
Scot Judson, Esq., for William Brotherton, Objector.

At the court's query, Mr. Georgeson reports of delays in confirming the pay on death (POD) accounts and requests a continuance to allow to confirm the preceding. Counsel suggests that if the accounts are determined to be POD accounts, it will help resolve this matter. The court agrees with counsel and allows Mr. Judson to provide his position to the court.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Jun-05-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Apr-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adamont Georgeson appeared via court call for Taleb Jalal (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding filing a spousal property petition for an alternative, and that Mr. Georgeson is not familiar with family law. The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Adamont Georgeson payable within 10 days of the order. Petition for letters of administration is continued to February 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Per Judge Ross C. Moody, the filing of the Petition for Spousal Property is authorized to be set for February 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wan: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Continued To Dec-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show will be issued to the Attorney Adamont Georgeson to appear on December 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he/she failed to appear and to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed for failure to appear pursuant to CCP 128. The Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Adamont Georgeson appearing via zoom for Taleb Jalal (petitioner).

The Court queries counsel if he still intends to pursue the petition or consider filing Spousal Property Petition, and that no declaration or due diligence has been filed for a heirs search. Mr. Gerogeson stated that some of the assets of distribution have not been sorted out yet, that they received Request for Special Notice from a William Brotherton alleging to be a half-brother, and that he will need more time to find more information on half-brother. Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
